_comment: Provider/cascade config. Edited by humans and by the model-watch bot PRs. structured: json_schema = strict structured outputs; json_object = schema embedded in prompt. Model IDs verified July 2026: openrouter cohere/north-mini-code:free and poolside/laguna-m.1:free confirmed live in catalog (qwen/qwen3-coder:free was removed and replaced); gemini-3.6-flash is the current live Flash model on Google's OpenAI-compatible endpoint (no google/ prefix) — gemini-2.0-flash still resolves as a valid model ID but AI Studio shows 0 RPM/TPM/RPD quota on it (deprecated for new free-tier allocation, existence-check alone doesn't catch this — see check_models.py note), confirmed dead via live 429s across three repos in one session, gemini-3.6-flash verified live with real quota, structured json_schema output, and vision; groq llama-3.3-70b-versatile is the current Groq free-tier Llama 70B model. deepseek-v4-flash confirmed current on DeepSeek's own OpenAI-compatible API (api-docs.deepseek.com) — deepseek-chat/deepseek-reasoner deprecate 2026-07-24.
